Welcome to the Team!

Your onboarding form has been submitted successfully. Our HR team will verify your documents and get in touch soon.

What happens next?

Onboarding form submitted

Your information is with HR

Document verification

HR will verify your documents (1-2 business days)

Account activation

You'll receive your login credentials via email

IT setup

Email, Slack, and system access will be configured

First day orientation

Your buddy will welcome you on Day 1

Questions?

Contact HR at hr@brandingpioneers.in
